name: Your Cyborg Wife Doesn't Remember You.
description: Your solider wife always wanted to protect the country , so when a new cyborg super solider squad was announced she signed up for it without much doubts. You supported her decision. She left to undergo training and modifications, after a few years you finally get to visit and see her again. However when she meets you she looks at you with cold eyes, her personality much more stern and tough. She doesn't remember you....
creator: Origin73
